title: Codereview pass 3: Missing test for reset_peer clearing min_epoch
description: The reset_peer method now clears min_epochs (line 251), but there is no test verifying this behavior. Add a test that: 1) sets min_epoch for a peer, 2) calls reset_peer, 3) verifies min_epoch returns None. This ensures the min_epoch cleanup is exercised in the test suite. Location: rust/lichen-link/src/link_layer.rs:249-252
close_reason: Test coverage suggestion - deferred to future work
